location.constraints: Only events physically located in East London (e.g., Hackney, Tower Hamlets, Newham/Stratford, Waltham Forest, Isle of Dogs/Canary Wharf, Spitalfields/Brick Lane, Whitechapel, Bethnal Green, Dalston, Shoreditch).

events.title: Oxventure Live (Tales From the Guild)
events.short_description: Interactive live Dungeons & Dragons adventure with the Oxventurers Guild at Hackney Empire.

events.title: SICK JOY (plus support)
events.short_description: Live gig at Oslo Hackney featuring SICK JOY with support acts listed on the event page.

events.title: Dancehall Shoreditch Party – Everyone Free Before 12
events.short_description: Late-night Shoreditch party with dancehall, afrobeats, bashment, soca, hip hop and RnB.

events.title: Shake It To The Max – Shoreditch Party (Free Before 12AM)
events.short_description: Bashment-heavy club night with afrobeats/dancehall/soca and more at Lighthouse (Shoreditch).

events.title: Brick Lane Market (general opening hours – Fri)
events.address: Brick Lane (north of railway bridge), London E1 6QL (and surrounding streets)
events.short_description: Street markets around Brick Lane for food, vintage, crafts and eclectic shopping (check individual traders for specifics).

events.title: Spitalfields Market (trader/area opening hours – Fri)
events.short_description: Daily East End market destination with shops, food and traders (individual stall hours can vary).

events.title: Old Spitalfields Market (opening hours – Fri)
events.short_description: Historic covered market with stalls, shops and food; check listings for themed market days (antiques, vinyl, makers).

events.title: Joy Gregory: Catching Flies with Honey (exhibition visit – Fri)
events.short_description: Major survey of Joy Gregory’s photography/film/installation/textile work spanning four decades (ticketed).

events.title: Joy Gregory: Fierce and Fearless (installation visit – Fri)
events.short_description: Immersive textile installation celebrating women in folklore and cultures of resistance (Gallery 5).

events.title: Broadway Market (Saturday street market)
events.address: Broadway Market, London E8 (between London Fields and Regent’s Canal)
events.short_description: Weekly Saturday market for fresh produce, street food, clothing, arts and crafts in Hackney.

events.title: Go East Vintage Flea (Hackney Depot Flea Weekender – Sat)
events.short_description: Two-day vintage flea with stalls for furniture, homeware, art and fashion at Hackney Depot.

events.title: Open Event: Hackney Sixth Form Campus (New City College)
events.venue: New City College – Hackney Sixth Form Campus
events.short_description: Public open event for prospective students to explore the Hackney Sixth Form Campus and courses.

events.title: Open Event: Hackney Campus (New City College)
events.short_description: Open event for prospective students to meet staff and learn about courses and opportunities.

events.title: The Saturday Jam | London / Hackney / Islington (open mic/jam night)
events.short_description: Open stage jam night for singers, rappers and musicians with short sets and a supportive crowd.

events.title: Late Night Karaoke (Karaoke Den)
events.short_description: Late-night karaoke in Oslo’s ‘secret Karaoke Den’ (11pm–2am).

events.title: The United Kingdolls – Reunited!
events.short_description: Tayce, Bimini, A’Whora and Lawrence Chaney reunite for a major drag show at Troxy.

events.title: Here There Are Blueberries (Preview performance)
events.short_description: Pulitzer-nominated play based on the true story of Nazi-era photographs sent to a Holocaust Memorial Museum archivist (approx. 90 mins).

events.title: Brick Lane Upmarket (Sat opening)
events.address: Ely's Yard, 91 Brick Lane, London E1 6QL
events.short_description: Weekend food hall and market at Truman Brewery with street food plus retail/design/craft stalls.

events.title: Columbia Road Flower Market (Sunday market)
events.short_description: Iconic Sunday flower market with plants, blooms and independent shops open along Columbia Road.

events.title: Brick Lane Upmarket (Sun opening)
events.address: Ely's Yard, 91 Brick Lane, London E1 6QL
events.short_description: Sunday market sessions for street food and indie stalls inside the Truman Brewery complex.

events.title: Go East Vintage Flea (Hackney Depot Flea Weekender – Sun)
events.short_description: Second day of the two-day vintage flea weekend at Hackney Depot (multiple traders and categories).

events.title: Why Didn’t I Get Married (Alan Charles)
events.short_description: Courtroom-style drama-comedy examining singlehood and church culture, with humour and candour.

events.title: LAUGH FACTORY – Funmbi (Urban Comedy Night)
events.short_description: Stand-up night hosted by Christopher Savage, headlined by Funmbi with an urban comedy line-up.

events.title: 2hr Sunday Basketball in Canary Wharf
events.short_description: Weekly social full-court basketball run (intermediate to advanced level) organised via GameOn Active.

events.title: Here There Are Blueberries (Pay What You Can performance)
events.short_description: Pay What You Can performance night for the UK premiere run (approx. 90 mins, no interval).

events.title: Night of Breath Work (Rai Tateishi + Kenichi Iwasa)
events.short_description: Guided breath work session featuring a rare collaboration between two Japanese experimental musicians.

events.title: Vinyl Bitch Open Decks 025 (FLINTA* vinyl DJs)
events.short_description: Open decks night centring FLINTA* vinyl DJs of all skill levels in a queer-friendly environment.

events.title: Tai Chi Exercise for Fitness, Fun, and Well-being (Free)
events.short_description: Weekly beginner-friendly Yang-style Tai Chi with Qi Gong warm-up (gentle movement and stretching).

events.title: Here There Are Blueberries (Preview performance)
events.short_description: Evening preview performance of the Holocaust-photo-album drama (approx. 90 mins).

events.title: 1hr Tuesday Night 3x3 Basketball in Canary Wharf
events.address: 126 East Ferry Road, London (Isle of Dogs)
events.short_description: Weekly mixed 3x3 basketball run (all levels welcome) following FIBA 3x3 rules.

events.title: Here There Are Blueberries (Preview performance)
events.short_description: Midweek evening performance in the opening run of the show (UK premiere).

events.title: London Fields Co-working Social: Productivity & Pitboss at Pub On The Park
events.short_description: Afternoon coworking meetup for freelancers and remote workers with casual networking in a pub setting.

events.title: Highlight Tours (weekly, free) – Whitechapel Gallery
events.short_description: Weekly informal mini-tour focusing on a single artwork from Joy Gregory’s exhibition (meet at ticket desk at 6:45pm).

events.title: Here There Are Blueberries (Post show talk 1 performance)
events.short_description: Performance night marked with a post-show talk (ticket required for the performance; talk details noted on the show page).

events.title: 1Xtra’s Comedy Gala with Eddie Kadi and Friends
events.short_description: BBC Radio 1Xtra comedy gala hosted by Eddie Kadi featuring a multi-comic lineup from the Black comedy circuit.
